description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and large glass windows, featuring a prominent outdoor terrace covered by a glass canopy. The front facade is characterized by a series of tall, narrow windows and a main entryway flanked by two palm trees and a paved walkway. The rear of the house includes a spacious patio area with outdoor seating and a hot tub, partially shaded by the glass canopy. The house is surrounded by landscaped elements, including a cluster of leafy trees and manicured garden beds. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light-colored material, giving the house a sleek and contemporary appearance. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and strong connections between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a covered outdoor terrace, surrounded by landscaped gardens and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, tall windows, palm trees, and the glass-covered terrace with outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the large glass windows, leafy trees, and the spacious patio area with a hot tub.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the flat roof, symmetrical window arrangement, and landscaped garden beds with palm trees.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring the main entryway, vertical window strips, and the paved walkway leading to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, flanked by tall vertical windows, accessed via a paved walkway and framed by palm trees, with no porch or overhang.
